# workflows Directory — GitHub Actions Workflows

## Overview
The `workflows` directory contains all GitHub Actions automation for this repository.  
These workflows define CI/CD behavior, documentation automation, and any event‑driven processes triggered by GitHub events.

All contents are categorized automatically based on filename semantics.  
A complete alphabetical index is included at the bottom.

---

# CATEGORIZED DIRECTORY

## 1. Continuous Integration Workflows
Automated checks, tests, and validation triggered on pushes, pull requests, or merges.

ci.yml  

## 2. Documentation Automation
Workflows that build, validate, or publish documentation.

docs-autobuild.yml

# Summary
The `workflows` directory defines all GitHub Actions automation for the repository.  
It ensures consistent CI/CD execution, documentation automation, and reliable event‑driven processes.
